files.patch: @@ -5891,3 +5891,5 @@ - If the frame's method is a value object constructor and - the requested local is the "this" object, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, if the requested local is the + "this" object, and "this" is a value + object under construction, the value_ptr is set to a snapshot + of the "this" object that represents the value + object's state at the point the snapshot is taken. @@ -5947,2 +5949,4 @@ - If the frame's method is a value object constructor, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, and the local instance is a value + object under construction, the value_ptr is set to a snapshot + of the "this" object that represents the value + object's state at the point the snapshot is taken. @@ -14140,0 +14144,1 @@ + When preview features are enabled, this event does not supports value object allocations.
